data.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Files read. plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md reviewed. Phase 3 structure confirmed: Step 1 (Create/Update Epic) → Step 2 (Set Dependencies) → Step 3 (Validate Ticket Health, runs validate-issues.sh) → Step 4 (Invoke Preplanning, with Step 4a Dispatch Complexity Evaluator). Sentinel write needs to be inserted between Step 3 and Step 4.
